chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF THE FUQAHA (JURISTS) AND THE ULAMA (SCHOLARS)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 481)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 481)
text: سُئِلَ عَنِ النُّجُومِ قَالَ مَا يَعْلَمُهَا إِلَّا أَهْلُ بَيْتٍ مِنَ الْعَرَبِ وَ أَهْلُ بَيْتٍ مِنَ الْهِنْدِ.

en.hubeali: H 14956 – Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel Bin Salih, from the one who informed him, the following:
I asked about the stars (Astrology) from Abu Abdullahasws. The Imamasws replied: ‘No one knows it except for a People of a household from the Arabs, and a people of a household from India’.
en.sarwar: 509. Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Abu Al-Abbas Ubeydullah Bin Ahmad Al-Dahqan, from Ali Bin Al-Hassan Al-Tatary, from Muhammad Bin Ziyad Baya’ Al-Sabiry, from Aban, from Sabbah bin Sayabat, from Al-Mu‘alla bin Khunays who said: I went with the letters of Abdul Salaam Bin Naeem, and Sudeyr, and a letter of someone else to Abu Abdullah (a.s.), When Al-Musawwadat makes his appearance, before the appearance of the sons of Al-Abbas, we have estimated that this Command would come to you (a.s.), so what do you (a.s.) see?’ ‘He (a.s.) threw the letters on the ground, and then said: ‘Uff! Uff! I (a.s.) am not an Imam (a.s.) for these ones, but they very well know that he (ajfj) would be killing Al-Sufyani’.
